levels.name: discoverability
levels.description: Can an agent with no prior knowledge of this project fetch the registry and read its contents?

checks.description: The public registry URL returns HTTP 200
The response body is a valid JSON array
component_contract.json is publicly accessible from this repo

levels.name: self_reference
levels.description: Does the registry list itself as a component, with correct fields pointing back to itself?

checks.description: The registry contains an entry with component_name = pipeline_components_registry
The self-entry has a non-empty component_output_url field
The component_output_url in the self-entry matches the URL the registry was fetched from
verify.js is publicly accessible from this repo

levels.name: completeness
levels.description: Does every entry in the registry have all required fields?

checks.description: Every entry has the following fields: component_name, component_contract_url, component_output_url, component_verify_reports_url

levels.name: repos_accessible
levels.description: Is every GitHub repository listed in the registry accessible?

checks.description: The component_contract_url of each entry responds with HTTP 200
